pricing.packaging: Premium gift box with carrying case (48pcs/carton)

sellingPoints: Entry-level FPV drone perfect for beginners
Under 250g – no registration needed in most countries
HD camera captures aerial photos and videos
Great STEM learning tool for teens

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Spark your passion for flying! The Mini FPV Drone combines ease of use with exciting FPV capabilities. Weighing just 85g, it's registration-free in most countries and perfect for beginners learning to fly.
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 点燃你的飞行热情！迷你FPV无人机将易用性与激动人心的第一人称视角功能相结合。仅重85克，在大多数国家无需注册，非常适合初学者学习飞行。

marketingCopy.headlineEn: Take Flight – Mini FPV Racing Drone Spark
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 起飞吧——迷你FPV竞速无人机火花
marketingCopy.bodyEn: The Spark isn't just a toy drone – it's your gateway to the sky. Featuring real-time FPV video feed to your smartphone, HD camera, and intelligent flight modes like auto-hover and one-key landing, it makes flying accessible and thrilling for everyone from first-timers to aspiring pilots.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: 火花不仅是一款玩具无人机——它是你通往天空的大门。通过智能手机实时传输FPV视频画面、高清摄像头和自动悬停、一键降落等智能飞行模式，它让从首次尝试到有抱负的飞行员的每个人都能轻松体验飞行的乐趣与刺激。
